ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the book */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* URL or path to the thumbnail image of the book */,
  "flags" TEXT /* Flags or special notes about the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the book is written */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary or brief description of the book */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding record */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the book is held */,
  "shelf_location" TEXT /* Shelf location within the branch */,
  "number_of_holdings" INTEGER /* Total number of copies of the book */,
  "available_copies" INTEGER /* Number of available copies */,
  "last_checked_out" TEXT /* Date when the book was last checked out */,
  "next_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the book is due to be returned */,
  "is_large_print" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the book is a large print edition */,
  "is_special_collection" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the book belongs to a special collection */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the holding record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the branch */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the branch */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the branch */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the branch */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the branch is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the collection is visible to patrons */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for the collection */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL or path to the icon image for the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_collections" (
  "book_collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between a book and a collection */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the book was added to the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_collections_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_collections_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book reserved */,
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patron making the reservation */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date when the reservation was made */,
  "queue_position" INTEGER /* Position in the reservation queue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation */,
  "expected_availability_date" TEXT /* Expected date when the book will be available for pickup */,
  "is_notified" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the patron has been notified about the availability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_patron_id FOREIGN KEY ("patron_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patrons" (
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patron */,
  "patron_name" TEXT /* Name of the patron */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patron */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date when the patron joined the library */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the patron */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patron */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the patron's membership is active */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity by the patron */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patron_id")
)
